why_it_matters: It may reduce the cost or complexity of a repeatable user task.
business_insight: 优先把论文能力收窄成一个高频、可衡量的客户任务：垂直行业 AI 助手。
product_idea: Build a domain-specific assistant with auditable workflows.
skill_or_agent_idea: Create a reusable skill that applies Performance of large language models on undergraduate endodontic multiple-choice questions. to one customer workflow.
why_selected: Selected by deterministic commercial and feasibility signals.
risks: The research result may not transfer to real customer data; validate quality and cost early.
recommended_next_step: Interview five target users and build one measurable demo within seven days.

title: Mapping Free-Text Emergency Department Diagnoses to ICD-10 Codes Using Large Language Model Embeddings
